gauge.name: Colgan Creek near Sebastopol

impacts.statement: Major Flooding.  Major floodplain inundation and water levels at approximately 1 foot above elevation of bridge deck on Llano Road.
Moderate Flooding. Additional floodplain and roadway inundation on Llano Road.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Warning, if not yet already issued.

Minor Flooding.  Floodplain upstream of the Llano Road bridge on right bank (north) side begins to flood into adjacent farmland.  NWS will issue an Urban/Small Stream Advisory, if not yet already issued.
Monitor Stage.  Roadside ditch upstream of Llano Road bridge on the left bank (south) side begins to flood.  NWS may issue a Flash Flood Watch, if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Graphical forecasts are not available during times of high water, forecast crest information can be found in the local WFO web page.
